steps.title: Identify the starting structure
steps.content: The sentence begins with How, a question word, indicating an interrogative sentence. We need to complete it with an independent clause that forms a grammatically correct question.

steps.title: Apply the question word sentence rule
steps.content: Questions starting with question words like How require subject-verb inversion and must end with a question mark. Choice D alone satisfies both requirements with “will Umuofia's traditions be affected?” A and C lack subject-verb inversion; B inverts correctly but ends with a period instead of a question mark. That matches choice D — D is correct.
